money_finance.correctAnswer: Sto risparmiando denaro per comprare un nuovo laptop.
hints: Use present continuous + infinitive of purpose.
It dispenses cash.

money_finance.prompt: Say: I spend too much money on coffee every week.
money_finance.correctAnswer: Spendo troppi soldi in caffè ogni settimana.
hints: Use 'spend money on' for expenses.

money_finance.prompt: Say: I have set up a monthly budget to track my expenses.
money_finance.correctAnswer: Ho impostato un budget mensile per tenere traccia delle mie spese.
hints: Use present perfect for a recent action with present relevance.

money_finance.prompt: Say: If I had saved more last year, I could afford this holiday.
money_finance.correctAnswer: Se avessi risparmiato di più l'anno scorso, potrei permettermi questa vacanza.
hints: Use third conditional for past regret.

money_finance.prompt: Say: Inflation erodes purchasing power if wages fail to keep pace.
money_finance.correctAnswer: L'inflazione erode il potere d'acquisto se i salari non tengono il passo.
hints: Use zero conditional for general economic truths.

money_finance.prompt: Say: The central bank is expected to raise interest rates next quarter.
money_finance.correctAnswer: Si prevede che la banca centrale aumenti i tassi di interesse nel prossimo trimestre.
hints: Use passive 'is expected to' for reported predictions.

money_finance.prompt: Say: Diversifying your portfolio mitigates exposure to market volatility.
money_finance.correctAnswer: Diversificare il proprio portafoglio riduce l'esposizione alla volatilità del mercato.
hints: Gerund subject; formal register.
